zh.lifeSummary: 當Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray於1033年之前出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，他的父親Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray63歲，母親Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots19歲。他和Fimmghuala De Angus至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1058年3月17日在蘇格蘭班福爾斯特拉斯賀波吉，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray于1033年之前出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，他的父亲Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray63岁，母亲Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots19岁。他和Fimmghuala De Angus至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1058年3月17日在苏格兰班福爾斯特拉斯賀波吉，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacRory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí ‘son of Ruaidhrí’ (see Rorie ), a personal name derived from ruadh ‘red’ + rí ‘king’. There is possible influence from the Old Norse personal names Hróthrekr (see Roderick ) and Hróthgeirr (see Rogers 2), forms of which were used as Anglicized equivalents.

variants.name: McCreary
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Ruidhrí, a variant of Mac Ruaidhrí, ‘son of Ruaidhrí’, a personal name meaning ‘red king’. See also McCrory .

variants.name: Rorie
meanings: Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí ‘son of Ruaidhrí’ (Rory); see McCrory .

variants.name: McGrory
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McCrory  .

variants.name: McCrorey
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McCrory  .

nameMeanings.name: Lulach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian and Rusyn: from the personal name Lukach, which is a variant of Luka (see Lucas , compare Lukac ).

Americanized form of Hungarian Lukács (see Lukacs ), Serbian, Croatian, Slovenian, Czech, Slovak, and Rusyn (from Slovakia, Serbia, and Croatia) Lukač or Lukáč (see Lukac ), and Rusyn (from Poland) Łukacz, cognates of 1 above.

variants.name: Lucas
meanings: In part a learned form of Luke , in part a transferred use of the surname derived from it in the Middle Ages. The Latin form Lucas was often used in the Middle Ages in written documents in place of the spoken vernacular form Luke, hence the common surname. It is also the spelling preferred in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, which has had some influence on its selection as a given name. There has been a sharp rise in its popularity since the turn of the century. Lucas is now also used as an Anglicized form of various Eastern European equivalents ( see the cognates listed at Luke ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

nameMeanings.name: “The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with odal ‘inherited property’ as the first element.

variants.name: Utt
meanings: From earlier Uda, a Germanic name meaning ‘heritage’; name of the mother of Kriemhild in the Nibelungenlied.

en.lifeSummary: When Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray was born before 1033, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray, was 63 and his mother, Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots, was 19. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Fimmghuala De Angus. He died on 17 March 1058, in Strathbogie, Banffshire, Scotland, and was buried in Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray est né avant 1033, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Fimmghuala De Angus. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1058, à Strathbogie, Banffshire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: Iona, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray vor 1033 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray 63 und seine Mutter Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots 19. Er hatte mit Fimmghuala De Angus mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. März 1058 in Strathbogie, Banffshire, Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray è nato il prima del 1033 nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray, aveva 63 anni e il suo madre, Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Fimmghuala De Angus. Morì il 17 marzo 1058, nel Strathbogie, Banffshire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Morayが1033年以前にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Morayは63歳，母Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scotsは19歳であった。彼はFimmghuala De Angusとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1058年3月17日にスコットランドバンフシュアイアストラスボジで死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray(이)가 1033년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Fimmghuala De Angus(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1058년 3월 17일 스컷랜드 반프실르 스트래스보기에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray nasceu antes 1033, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Fimmghuala De Angus. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1058, em Strathbogie, Banffshire, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: иона, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray родился перед 1033 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gille Coemgáin mac Máil Brigti Mormaer of Moray было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Gruoch mi Boedhe Queen of Scots, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Fimmghuala De Angus. Он умер 17 марта 1058 г. в местности стратбоги, банффшир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.
